title: StreamChunk
description: A single SSE event sent from Python -> .NET -> React. One 'type' governs how the frontend should render it.

type.description: token = a piece of generated text to append. status = a JobStatus transition (see job-status-transitions.md). error = terminal failure, frontend should stop listening.

content.description: For type=token: the text fragment. For type=status: one of the JobStatus enum values. For type=error: human-readable error message (never a stack trace).
